body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-57441", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-41", "name": "Improper Resolution of Path Equivalence"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-178", "name": "Improper Handling of Case Sensitivity"}], "description": "On case-insensitive filesystems (macOS, Windows), PathFilter compiled its deny-list patterns case-sensitively and matched the path verbatim, so names like `.Git/config`, `.GIT/config`, or `.oBsIdIaN/secrets.md` slipped past the `.git`/`.obsidian`/`node_modules` restriction while the OS opened the real file. On Windows, trailing dots/spaces (`.git./config`, `.git /config`) bypassed it the same way. Affects both `isAllowed` (read/write/move/search) and `isAllowedForListing`. Vault-root `..` containment is NOT affected. Fixed in 0.11.4 by case-insensitive matching plus per-segment canonicalization before the deny-list check. Reported privately by novice-22.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j99q-93c9-h869", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T14:30:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j99q-93c9-h869", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j99q-93c9-h869"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-57441"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-18T14:30:43Z", "references": ["https://github.com/bitbonsai/mcpvault/security/advisories/GHSA-j99q-93c9-h869", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j99q-93c9-h869"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/bitbonsai/mcpvault/security-advisories/GHSA-j99q-93c9-h869", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/bitbonsai/mcpvault", "summary": "MCPVault: PathFilter restricted-directory deny-list bypass via case and trailing dot/space equivalence", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T21:30:53Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j99q-93c9-h869", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.11.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@bitbonsai/mcpvault"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.11.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MCPVault: PathFilter restricted-directory deny-list bypass via case and trailing dot/space equivalence
